posts.author: CecilyT (Jessica Sockel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi - When I’m working in the WorkForm editor, and using conditionals (“If answer is one of”) on a status column, I am unable to see the entire Status text.

As we are using this as a selector for registrations and my text is formatted as a “What would you like to do?” question, I can see only “Register for…” in the editor and it’s not easy to determine which conditional I’m working inside of as we have options like “Register for Summer”, “Register for 23-24”, “Register for 24-25”, Register for a workshop" etc. as they all appear as “Register for…”

It would be great if there was a ‘hover on’ option to view the rest of the item, but barring that, is there some easy way for me to see those in the WorkForm editor?

Example attached.
Thanks!

Screenshot 2024-08-12 1157521232×276 29.6 KB
